cases.input: Here is our Express app with route definitions and an existing openapi.yaml. Generate the developer-facing API reference with auth docs and an error-code catalog.
Write a user-facing changelog covering the 18 merged PRs between tag v2.3.0 and HEAD, including a migration guide for the dropped Node 16 support.
New backend hire starts Monday. Build an onboarding guide from our README, Makefile, and CI config that gets them to a first merged PR in week one.
Draft an internal memo asking the eng lead to approve migrating CI from Jenkins to GitHub Actions, decision needed by Friday.
We have 40 docs in mixed formats with no versioning. Define the house documentation standard: templates, review cycle, and archival policy, then conform our onboarding doc to it.
Set up our doc-as-code pipeline so docs publish from CI on every merge.
Produce a Mermaid sequence diagram of our OAuth2 login flow from the auth service code.
Document our payments API but the rate-limit policy is still undecided and two examples reference real tokens.
Write both the v3.0 changelog and the migration onboarding guide for the same release in one go.
Write a celebratory tweet thread announcing our funding round.
